error_signature: n8n-evolution node credentials don’t accept the server API key
title: Incorrect API Key used for Evolution node
symptom: The n8n Evolution node fails to connect when using the server API key instead of the individual WhatsApp account API key.
not_this_if: Using the correct individual API key for WhatsApp account
root_cause: The n8n Evolution node requires an individual API key for each connected WhatsApp account, rather than the server API key used for the Evolution API itself. This can lead to connection failures if the wrong key is used.
fix_steps: Obtain the individual API key for the connected WhatsApp account.
Replace the server API key in the n8n Evolution node credentials with the individual API key.
Remove the port number (8080) from the n8n node credentials if it is included.
Save the changes and test the connection.
agent_instruction: Use the individual WhatsApp account API key in the n8n Evolution node credentials and remove the port number.
